Petition Requesting That Statutory Compensation Be Paid Prior To Preliminary Distribution, Or In The Alternative That Entire Estate Be Closed.
Off Calendar Feb-20-2013 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
Off Calendar Dec-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Katheryn Murphy for Margaret Buc (Petitioner/Executor). Loren Lopin (Objector/former Attorney for Margaret Buc) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it is not inclined to reduce bond at this time, that it would be appropriate to reduce bond once distribution is made, that there is enough income to permit a preliminary distribution and that there is no basis to determine Mr. Lopin's share of statutory fees at this point. Mr. Lopin presented oral argument to support his position with regard to payment of his statutory fees prior to any distribution and also advised the Court that he filed a petition for fees with a hearing date of February 20, 2012. Ms. Murphy requested a six month time period. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court granted the request for preliminary distribution and denied the request to reduce bond (subject to review and modification of the order). The Estate will remain open pending arriving to the point where it can be closed. Status on close of the estate or approval of a status report was set for May 22, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
